speaker: mon_civilian_panic
sound: Someone screams frantically: 'Help! Somebody help me!'

speaker: mon_civilian_panic
mon_civilian_stationary
sound: Someone babbles incoherently: 'Don't come near... go away... please go away...'

speaker: mon_civilian_panic
sound: Someone screams: 'This isn't real! This is just a dream, right?!'

speaker: mon_civilian_stationary
sound: Someone murmurs with hollow eyes: 'God... why have you forsaken us...'

speaker: mon_civilian_stationary
sound: Someone whispers, devoid of hope: 'It's all over... it's the end of the world...'

speaker: mon_civilian_panic
sound: Someone screams loudly: 'Don't grab me! Please don't eat me!'

speaker: mon_civilian_panic
sound: Someone cries out, breaking down: 'I don't want to die! I don't want to die in a place like this!'

speaker: mon_civilian_panic
sound: Someone roars in despair: 'Why me! Why is this happening!'

speaker: mon_civilian_stationary
sound: Someone smiles with lifeless eyes: 'Great... this nightmare is finally ending...'

speaker: mon_civilian_stationary
sound: Someone mutters: 'Fake... it's all fake... just close my eyes and it'll be fine...'

speaker: mon_civilian_child
sound: A child cries out loudly: 'Daddy? Mommy? Where are you!'

speaker: mon_civilian_child
sound: A child sobs in fear: 'I'm so scared... I want to go home...'

speaker: mon_civilian_child
sound: A child screams in terror: 'Don't bite me! Go away!'

speaker: mon_civilian_child
sound: A child cries out loudly: 'Waaah... somebody save me!'

speaker: mon_civilian_child
sound: A child shouts in panic: 'Monsters! Go away! Go away!'

speaker: mon_civilian_parent
sound: Someone screams hysterically: 'Where is my child! Have you seen my baby!'

speaker: mon_civilian_parent
sound: Someone begs into thin air: 'Give me back my child... please...'

speaker: mon_civilian_parent
sound: Someone roars: 'Baby! Where are you! Answer me!'

speaker: mon_civilian_parent
sound: Someone bellows: 'Don't touch my child! Come at me if you dare!'

speaker: mon_civilian_parent
sound: Someone shouts deliriously: 'Run, baby! Don't look back! I'll hold them off!'

speaker: mon_civilian_parent
sound: Someone cries in despair: 'I'm sorry... I'm sorry I couldn't protect you...'

sound: Someone roars: 'Come at me if you've got the guts!'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_fighter

sound: Someone bellows: 'Don't think you're having me for dinner!'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child
sound: A child mutters softly: 'I'm not scared... I won't be scared of you...'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child
sound: A child says breathlessly: 'Don't come near me!'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child
sound: A child taunts loudly: 'You can't catch me! Big dummy!'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child
sound: A child taunts loudly: 'Don't bother chasing if you're that slow!'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child
sound: A child laughs breathlessly: 'Good thing you're dumb enough to trip over things!'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child
sound: A childish voice shouts: 'Stay away from me!'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child_elite
sound: A child's playful laughter.

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child_elite
sound: A child snorts contemptuously: 'With that speed... you think you can catch me?'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child_elite
sound: A cold, childish voice whispers: 'If your footsteps are too loud, you'll die...'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child_elite
sound: A child warns through gritted teeth: 'Don't come close! Whether you're human or a monster... I'll strike!'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child_elite
sound: A child says in a flat tone: 'The game of hide and seek is over...'

speaker: mon_civilian_survivor_child_elite
sound: A childish voice says ruthlessly: 'Adults always say we need to help each other... but they are the fastest to die...'
